example.title: 90-day post-implementation assessment of SaaS billing migration
example.inputs: Baseline DPO=42 days, baseline-error-rate=2.1%, sample n=312. 90-day actuals from finance + analytics + ops ticketing.
example.commentary: Illustrates r1 (90-day stage), r2 (sources cited), r3 (n=312), r4 (finance + analytics), r5 (no deprecated reqs in this example).
